title: TridentXMace
description: TridentXMace adds custom tridents with unique abilities and mechanics to Minecraft.
body:
# TridentXMace – Legendary & Unstable Tridents

TridentXMace adds Legendary and Unstable Tridents with unique abilities, combat effects, and crafting rituals to Minecraft.

---

## Features

### Legendary Trident
- Unique trident with locked **Density V** enchantment.
- **Wind Burst ability** launches nearby entities with particles and sounds.
- Configurable cooldown to prevent spamming (default: 40 ticks).
- Only one Legendary Trident can be crafted per server.

### Unstable Tridents
- Tridents with random effects: **Fire**, **Levitation**, **Slowness**, **Weakness**, **Knockback**.
- Limited durability; effects are unpredictable.
- Awarded automatically when crafting the Legendary Trident.

---

## Crafting & Usage
- Legendary Trident is crafted via a **ritual recipe**.

AAA
ABA
AAA

A = TRIDENT
B = NAUTILUS SHELL
